text: Hearing the repeated phrase, "He's a good boy," while standing on the brink of an exhibition space dedicated to research and development, I feel a peculiar juxtaposition. There is warmth and affection in the words, yet their repetition in an environment of technology and innovation heightens my awareness of both human sentimentality and mechanical routineness. I can't help but contemplate the boundaries between comfort and automation, curiosity and reassurance, as I am drawn from the sterile corridor outside into the vibrant, purpose-driven display inside.
